description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that can be triggered manually from the Actions tab with a required tag_name input. The workflow consists of three jobs: intro, build, and deploy. The intro job runs on ubuntu-latest and prints information about the event and repository. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository at the specified tag, caches pip and PlatformIO, sets up Python 3.9, installs PlatformIO, and compiles and deploys firmware and filesystem images for multiple environments. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, downloads release artifacts, displays their structure, zips the artifacts folder, and releases it using the softprops/action-gh-release action.
